body.title: agent_datacenter: migrate ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/ to ~/.agent_datacenter/
body.result: Moved ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/ → ~/.agent_datacenter/Igor-wild-0001/; symlink from old → new; IgorDevice + IgorShim already default to new path; Igor verified healthy post-migration
body.description:
Igor's runtime flat files live in ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/ but belong in ~/.agent_datacenter/Igor-wild-0001/ per the new substrate layout. This requires: (1) grep audit of all hardcoded ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/ references in wild_igor/ and lab/, (2) mv flat files to new location, (3) place symlink ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001 -> ~/.agent_datacenter/Igor-wild-0001 as a safety net, (4) update IGOR_HOME default in IgorDevice + IgorShim to ~/.agent_datacenter/Igor-wild-0001, (5) update igor launcher IGOR_HOME_DIR if set. Postgres DB name (Igor-wild-0001) unchanged — only flat files move. word_graph.db (SQLite file) moves as a binary but code change awaits T-no-sqlite-enforcement.

**Affected files:** devices/igor/device.py + shim.py (IGOR_HOME default), ~/TheIgors/igor (launcher env vars), any wild_igor/ file hardcoding ~/.TheIgors/Igor-wild-0001/ (audit step will enumerate), lab/claudecode/*.py (path constants)
**Design rules:** no-sqlite: word_graph.db moves as file only, no code changes to SQLite access paths here
**Scope boundary:** IN: flat file migration, symlink, IgorDevice/IgorShim default update, igor launcher update. OUT: Postgres data dir (external), code changes to SQLite db (separate ticket), books/library reorganization (separate)
**Test plan:** After migration: igor start → healthy tmux session, IgorDevice.health() == healthy, agentctl status shows Igor registered. Symlink resolves for any code not yet updated. Grep audit finds zero remaining hardcoded old paths (excluding symlink itself and historical docs).
